endpoints.name: List account balances
endpoints.description: Gets a list of balances for a bank account including end-of-day batch balance or running balances per transaction.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: List accounts
endpoints.description: Gets a list of all bank accounts of the SMB, with rich data like balances, account numbers and institutions holdingthe accounts.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: Get account
endpoints.description: Gets a specified bank account for a given company
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: List all transaction categories
endpoints.description: Gets a list of hierarchical categories associated with a transaction for greater contextual meaning to transactionactivity.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: Get transaction category
endpoints.description: Gets a specified bank transaction category for a given company
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{TRANSACTIONCATEGORYID}} with a real transactioncategoryid. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: List transactions
endpoints.description: Gets a list of transactions incurred by a bank account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid.

endpoints.name: Get bank transaction
endpoints.description: Gets a specified bank transaction for a given company
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CONNECTIONID}} with a real connectionid. Replace {{TRANSACTIONID}} with a real transactionid.

endpoints.name: List banking transactions
endpoints.description: Gets a list of transactions incurred by a company across all bank accounts.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CODAT_API_KEY}} with your CODAT API KEY. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid.
